title: Next-Level Enterprise: Monday AI & Our New Facebook Community

posts.author: Sivankinda (sivan s)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you ready for monday AI for Enterprise Users ?

monday’s AI-powered capabilities are bringing game-changing automation, decision-making, and efficiency to Enterprise teams.

So, we thought this was the perfect time to introduce monday.com for Enterprise community

What’s to come for Enterprise using monday.com AI in 2025?

AI Blocks – Customizable AI actions like Categorize, Extract, Sentiment Detection, and more , designed for Enterprise-scale workflows.

AI-Driven Service Management – monday service automates ticket resolutions, classifies tickets, and optimizes IT performance.

Enterprise-Level AI Agents – AI-powered Digital Workforce assists with project risk analysis, sales deal recovery, service issue tracking, and onboarding.

Seamlessly Embedded AI – AI is now fully integrated across monday.com’s platform, from CRM to resource management and workflow automation.

What’s Next?

Join our community to find out! Your go-to space for exclusive Enterprise features, real use cases, and expert insights on scaling with monday.com.

Big teams, big solutions—Join the monday for Enterprise community today!

mondayai #EnterpriseAutomation #GameChanger
